meta_data.description:
Format numbers with full locale support using the browser's built-in Intl.NumberFormat API. No external libraries needed.

✅ Currency formatting ($1,234.56 / 1.234,56 €)
✅ Compact notation (1.2M, 3.5K)
✅ Percentages (85%)
✅ Units (100 km/h, 25°C, 3 liters)
✅ Precision control (min/max decimal places)
✅ Sign display (+42, -42)
✅ Thousands separator control
✅ Scientific & engineering notation
✅ Error handling with error state output
✅ formatToParts() JSON output for custom rendering
✅ Advanced JSON options for full Intl.NumberFormat access

demo: https://nocode-to-knowcode.bubbleapps.io/version-test/formatter
forum: https://forum.bubble.io/t/number-formatter-plugin/241249
meta_data.name: 🤌 Number formatter
meta_data.plugin_instructions:
1. Drop the 🤌 Number formatter element on your page (it's invisible)
2. Set the number, locale, and formatting style (decimal, currency, percent, or unit)
3. Use the "Formatted number" output state to display the result

For currency: set Style to "currency" and provide a Currency code (e.g. USD, EUR)
For units: set Style to "unit" and provide a Unit (e.g. kilometer-per-hour, celsius)
For compact: set Notation to "compact" (turns 1234567 into 1.2M)

Tip: use the Advanced options field with raw JSON for full Intl.NumberFormat control.
